title: Cobblemon: Community Additons
description: A datapack for Cobblemon, adding custom moves and abilities from the community!
body:
This datapack adds in new moves and abilities coded to give to your Pokemon, ideas taken from the community / content creators, and even myself! This Project plans to add more and more over time, and ideas can be suggested to me to add in the future!
   
View all the additions in the spreadsheet!:
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1Q5IOR2c-_CGnmnqpZ6I7n4HPLiDNb9Q7PVYjqjbADmw/edit?gid=0#gid=0

Wanna make requests? Send one to the form!: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScDKrK64rCB30MTChZFjOMSCIT4ChOqS_Ipt1iq3IKb60HHxQ/viewform?usp=header

This pack does not add these new features autmatically, only the code, so you can add these new features to whomeever you like with your own datapack! If you have any ideas or suggestions, do let me know!

### Future Plans
- More Moves
- More Abilities
- Mod version?
- New Weathers / Terrains
- New Statuses?
- New Types?
- Fangame additions?
